name: ABB EMAX2 SHUNT OPENING RELEASE YO 24V DC 1SDA064085R1
description: ABB Emax2 air circuit breaker shunt opening release (YO), 24V DC coil, for remote tripping of Emax2 E1-E6 breakers. Plugs into accessory slot. MPN: 1SDA064085R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: ABB EMAX2 SHUNT OPENING RELEASE YO 110-120V AC/DC 1SDA064090R1
description: ABB Emax2 air circuit breaker shunt opening release (YO), 110-120V AC/DC coil, for remote tripping. For Emax2 E1-E6 breakers. MPN: 1SDA064090R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: ABB EMAX2 CLOSING RELEASE YC 24V DC 1SDA066193R1
description: ABB Emax2 air circuit breaker closing release (YC), 24V DC coil, for motorized closing of Emax2 breakers. Compatible with E1-E6 series. MPN: 1SDA066193R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: ABB EMAX2 MOTOR MECHANISM M 110-120V AC 1SDA068500R1
description: ABB Emax2 motor spring-charging mechanism (M), 110-120V AC, for motorized recharging of closing spring. Required for remote closing sequence. Compatible with E1-E6. MPN: 1SDA068500R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: ABB EMAX2 AUX CONTACTS AUP 1SDA064523R1
description: ABB Emax2 auxiliary contact block (AUP), 3 NO + 3 NC configurable contacts, 10A/250V AC, for position signaling (open/closed/tripped). Plugs into front accessory slot. MPN: 1SDA064523R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: ABB EMAX2 UNDER-VOLTAGE RELEASE YU 110-120V AC 1SDA064220R1
description: ABB Emax2 under-voltage release (YU), 110-120V AC coil, trips breaker when supply voltage drops below threshold. For critical power protection. Compatible with E1-E6. MPN: 1SDA064220R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: SCHNEIDER NW/NT MX SHUNT TRIP RELEASE 110-127V AC/DC LV429428
description: Schneider Electric Masterpact NW/NT MX shunt trip release, 110-127V AC/DC coil, for remote tripping of NW/NT series air circuit breakers. Snap-in installation. MPN: LV429428.

name: SCHNEIDER NW/NT XF CLOSING RELEASE 110-127V AC/DC LV431516
description: Schneider Electric Masterpact NW/NT XF closing release, 110-127V AC/DC coil, for remote closing of NW/NT series air circuit breakers. MPN: LV431516.

name: SCHNEIDER NW/NT MCH MOTOR MECHANISM 110-127V AC LV432595
description: Schneider Electric Masterpact NW/NT MCH motorized spring-charging mechanism, 110-127V AC, for remote re-charging of closing spring after trip. MPN: LV432595.

name: SCHNEIDER NW/NT OF AUX CONTACT 1NO+1NC LV429385
description: Schneider Electric Masterpact NW/NT OF auxiliary contact block, 1 NO + 1 NC, 10A/240V AC, for breaker open/closed position indication. MPN: LV429385.

name: KIRK KEY KSD SERIES MECHANICAL INTERLOCK FOR CIRCUIT BREAKERS
description: Kirk Key Interlocks KSD series mechanical key interlock set for circuit breakers. Enforces electrical safety sequence — prevents operating breaker without correct key sequence. Breaker-model specific, custom-configured. Specify breaker type on order.

spec.frameCompatibility: Specify: ABB Emax2, Schneider NW/NT, Eaton IZM, or Siemens WL

name: ABB EMAX2 SHUNT OPENING RELEASE YO 220-240V AC/DC 1SDA064095R1
description: ABB Emax2 shunt opening release (YO), 220-240V AC/DC coil, for remote tripping of Emax2 E1-E6 breakers. Used when control power is 240V. MPN: 1SDA064095R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: SCHNEIDER NW/NT MX SHUNT TRIP RELEASE 220-240V AC/DC LV429438
description: Schneider Electric Masterpact NW/NT MX shunt trip release, 220-240V AC/DC coil, for remote tripping. For NW/NT series. MPN: LV429438.

name: ABB EMAX2 ALARM CONTACT SDA FOR TRIP INDICATION 1SDA064529R1
description: ABB Emax2 SDA alarm contact block, 1 NO, for tripped (fault) position indication, separate from breaker open/close auxiliary contacts. 10A/250V AC. MPN: 1SDA064529R1.

spec.frameCompatibility: ABB Emax2 E1, E2, E4, E6

name: KIRK KEY KSC SERIES CIRCUIT BREAKER HANDLE LOCK-OFF
description: Kirk Key Interlocks KSC series handle-mounted lock for circuit breaker handle in OFF position. Prevents unauthorized or inadvertent operation. Specify breaker model for exact fit. Stainless steel hardware.

spec.frameCompatibility: Specify: ABB Emax2, Schneider NW/NT, Eaton IZM, or Siemens WL
